description: Style NoteA hot favourite from the fcuk collection, this pair of comfort trunks allows free leg movement, while the label on the outer side of the waistband offers abrasion-free comfort.Product DetailsComfort trunk offering a body defining FitLuxurious and lightweight cotton stretch for enhanced comfort Broad waistband with branding and pouch in the front Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash delicate inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanHang dry in shade
